---
title: "Updating Ticket Volumes"
sidebarTitle: "Updating Ticket Volumes"
description: "Managing ticket volumes and event capacity in Vivenu."
---

## Overview

Vivenu is used to manage ticket sales and event capacity for FKL events. Access is granted on request — use the **Contact Support** button on the OD if you need an account.

Support is available via the Vivenu Wiki videos (links provided separately) and their live chat, which is available 24/7.

---

## Managing Ticket Volumes

Ticket volumes for each event must be set correctly based on the number of season passes sold and the operational capacity available.

<Steps>
  <Step title="Find the number of season passes sold">
    Open the OD, find the event, and identify the number of tickets sold under season passes.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Calculate remaining capacity">
    Based on the total number of tickets that can be sold within a category, calculate how many individual tickets remain available.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Adjust for operational capacity">
    If the number of available karts is reduced on the day, lower the ticket volume accordingly. Do not sell more tickets than you have karts to support.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Update Vivenu">
    Update the ticket volume in the relevant single event in Vivenu to reflect the correct available capacity.
  </Step>
</Steps>
